visual: Stands on the right leg with left toe touching, right hand raised above the forehead and left hand settled by the hip, body upright like a crane.
motion_description: The motion begins with the torso rotating approximately 90 degrees to the left as weight shifts entirely onto the right leg. Simultaneously, the left hand pushes downward to settle by the hip, while the right arm sweeps down and rises in a deliberate arc to finish just above the head. During this arm motion, the left knee lifts high before the leg extends down to let the left toe lightly touch the ground. The entire sequence is performed with a slow, continuous flow, culminating in an upright stance on a single weight-bearing leg.
